title: Choose your depth
subtitle: Pick the length that matches your time and how much precision you want from the result.

quick.name: Quick
quick.desc: Get a fast read on your dominant patterns. Best for first-time curiosity.

standard.name: Standard
standard.desc: Balanced coverage of all 34 themes. The default for most people.

deep.name: Deep
deep.desc: Full bank for the most precise top-5. Worth the extra time before serious decisions.
